title: Nursery Rhyme. CXCV. Riddles.
content:
[A storm of wind.]

        Arthur O'Bower has broken his band,
        He comes roaring up the land; - 
        The King of Scots, with all his power,
        Cannot turn Arthur of the Bower!
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXCV. Riddles." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
